tasks.label: build-and-test-colab
tasks.command: pnpm -w -C .. build && pnpm -w -C web typecheck && pnpm -w -C web test:unit --silent && pnpm -w -C .. -r test --silent

tasks.label: typecheck-and-test-web
tasks.command: pnpm -w -C web typecheck && pnpm -w -C web test:unit --silent

tasks.label: typecheck-and-test-web-2
tasks.command: pnpm -w -C .. build && pnpm -w -C web typecheck && pnpm -w -C web test:unit --silent

tasks.label: typecheck-web-local-no-pnpm
tasks.command: cd web && rm -f tsconfig.tsbuildinfo 2>/dev/null || del /Q tsconfig.tsbuildinfo 2>nul && node ./node_modules/typescript/bin/tsc -p tsconfig.json --noEmit

tasks.label: typecheck-web-local-no-pnpm
tasks.command: cd web && del /Q tsconfig.tsbuildinfo 2>nul && node ./node_modules/typescript/bin/tsc -p tsconfig.json --noEmit

tasks.label: typecheck-web-local-no-pnpm
tasks.command: cd web && node -e "try{require('fs').readFileSync('./components/alunos/AlunoWizardDialog.tsx'); console.log('read ok');}catch(e){console.error(e)}" && node ./node_modules/typescript/bin/tsc -p tsconfig.json --noEmit

tasks.label: e2e-colaborador-wizard
tasks.command: pnpm -C web test:e2e -g "Wizard Colaborador - fluxo completo"
